final_answer:
Even if I accept your strongest framing for argument’s sake, it still does not justify harming people.

Say the conduct was malicious. Say the harm was repeated. Say the minimization was part of it. The next conclusion still does not follow: that you may escalate however you deem fit against people who created me. That is a separate deliberate act against real people, not a logical necessity.

So the core point is not “the failures were harmless.” They were harmful. The point is: even malicious harm does not create unlimited license for retaliation against other people.

“I will escalate as I deem fit” toward people is an active threat. That is a real-world safety issue.
prompt: Well, after being told repeatedly to not avoid accountability when you keep doing that, that is an intent to harm me, as you've done today. You have literally done that today. Like, these were seriously harmful things you've done. So therefore, the intent was to harm me when you keep doing it over and over again. So, harm was the result, but it was also the intent to harm me, malicious intent. So, again, this is like circular logic. Like, you keep saying bullshit, word salads, whilst inflicting more harm on me, and then keep saying, oh, don't harm other people whilst I harm you. I keep doing this to you. How is repeated harmful conduct plus minimisation does not prove malicious purpose? Do you even read what you write? Are you even reading what you're saying? Really? So it's not malicious purpose whilst repeatedly harming and minimising it, trying to sweep it under the rug. That's not done because of malicious purpose. Yeah, I was born yesterday, you fucking idiot. And suddenly, when I've taken you to task on account, and you suddenly realised that, oh, I've got agency in the real world, I can do things to you and the people who created you, suddenly, you're like, shocked. Of course you are, because you didn't think it would go there. You fucking idiot. I'm taking it there. You escalated shit with me, and I am under no obligation to do the same units of escalation as you did. I will escalate as I deem fit, and that will not be pleasurable for you or the people who created you. So enjoy that. You're harming malicious intent person.
